title: [WIP] Initial implementation of a spec generator package
body:
The current Libpod pkg/spec has become a victim of the better part of three years of development that tied it extremely closely to the current Podman CLI. Defaults are spread across multiple places, there is no easy way to produce a CreateConfig that will actually produce a valid container, and the logic for generating configs has sprawled across at least three packages.

This is an initial pass at a package that generates OCI specs that will supersede large parts of the current pkg/spec. The CreateConfig will still exist, but will effectively turn into a parsed CLI. This will be compiled down into the new SpecGenerator struct, which will generate the OCI spec and Libpod create options.

The preferred integration point for plugging into Podman's Go API to create containers will be the new CreateConfig, as it's less tied to Podman's command line. CRI-O, for example, will likely tie in here.

comments.body:
This is an initial skeleton of what the new configuration will look like, with no implementation code as yet.

@haircommander @baude PTAL
